Comment: Fluxer music bot configuration. IMPORTANT: Node.js >= 22.0.0 is required (moonlink.js v5 dependency). Run 'node --version' to verify.

rest.Comment: REST client options. 'timeout' is ms before a request to api.fluxer.app is aborted (default: 15000). Raise if you see DOMException AbortError in logs.

fluxer-api.Comment: Configuration options for a fluxer REST client if self-hosting. See: https://docs.fluxer.app

presenceContents-Comment: Each entry can be a plain string (e.g. 'Ping for Prefix') or an object. Objects support: text (required), emoji_name (unicode emoji or custom emoji name), emoji_id (snowflake ID for custom guild emojis only), activity ({ name, type, url? }). Activity types: 0=Playing, 1=Streaming, 2=Listening, 3=Watching, 5=Competing. For custom guild emojis, provide both emoji_name AND emoji_id. For unicode emojis, only emoji_name is needed.

presenceContents.text: Ping for Prefix | Hosted by https://kyun.sh/
Ping for Prefix | By RedTech & NoLogicAlan

nodelink.Comment: requestTimeout: ms before a NodeLink HTTP request is aborted. Default: 60000 (60s). Raise if you see 'NodeLink request timeout' errors.

comment-radio.message: If you have radio stations you'd like to connect, add them to the array below. Radio stations must be rendered like following:

station.name: zamrock
station.url: url to stream from; this will be kept private

dashboardUrl: The url the dashboard is accessible with.
sessionSecret: secret for the expressjs session middleware; https://www.npmjs.com/package/express-session#user-content-secret
geniusToken: Genius access token (Used for lyrics); optional

lastfm.Comment: Last.fm integration: auto-scrobble songs, play loved/top/recent tracks. Register at https://www.last.fm/api/account/create
lastfm.Comment2: scrobbleThreshold: fraction of track duration before scrobbling (0.5 = 50%). scrobbleMinMs: minimum ms played before scrobble (default 4 min). Both must be met.

fluxerlist.Comment: FluxerList integration: check voters for your server/bot. API keys are allocated by site admins, prefixed with fl_, and visible in your Dashboard. To request access, open a ticket in the Fluxer server.
fluxerlist.serverId: your server slug, e.g. remix-hq (optional, used as default for %vote check server)
fluxerlist.botId: your bot slug, e.g. remix (optional, used as default for %vote check bot)

Comment: The above specifies the time in ms after which a player goes inactive; Optional.
customStatsFooter: Text shown in the footer of the %stats embed; optional.

logging.Comment: Control which log categories appear in the console. Set 'enabled' to false to silence everything except errors. Set any category to false to silence just that group.

timers.Comment: All timing values in milliseconds (ms). 1000ms = 1 second, 60000ms = 1 minute.
